exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: HOLD 75kg. Moderate block: stop each set at RPE 8 (2 in reserve), don't grind. Last was 8/8/8 @ RPE 9. Lower-back priority — brace, no rounding.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: Bodyweight. Last was all-6 @ RPE 10. This block: stop with ~1 rep in the tank, don't hit dead failure on every set.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: HOLD 25kg. Faded to 10/10/8 @ RPE 10 last time — this block aim clean 10/10/10 at RPE 8-9, no fade.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: HOLD 30kg (last 12/12/12 @ RPE 10). Leave 1 in reserve this block.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: HOLD 40kg (last 15s @ RPE 9). Posture/shoulder health — controlled, squeeze rear delts.

exercises.name: Box Situp
exercises.notes: Bodyweight. Feet/legs supported. LOWER-BACK CAUTION — controlled range, no ballistic hyperextension. (Last Day B you subbed cable crunch for time — do the box situp this time.)

exercises.name: Machine Preacher Curl (drop set)
exercises.notes: ONE triple-drop, no rest: 30kg to failure -> ~25kg to failure -> ~20kg to failure. Finisher — taking these to failure is fine even in the hold block.

session_notes: Moderate pre-vacation block: hold weights, cap working sets at RPE 8-9, leave 1-2 reps in reserve. Only the preacher drop-set finisher goes to failure. Retention, not PRs.
